name_en: 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a tonal cotton lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
name_cn:
2025 Fall/Winter Collection, the GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This bucket bag features a tonal cotton lining and an internal compartment, offering excellent practicality.
Anacapria red embossed GG calfskin
Light gold-tone lining
Anacapria red cotton lining
Top handle with hook closure (height: 14 cm)
Also features a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: two compartments and a central snap-button compartment
Removable and adjustable calfskin shoulder strap (height: 52 cm - 57.5 cm; length: 107 cm - 114 cm)
Magnetic snap-button closure
Model: 815118.
Dimensions: 19 cm (W) x 18 cm (H) x 11 cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.45 kg
Color: Anacapria red embossed.
Made in Italy
